adopted_patterns.real_value: Server saves state on shutdown, restores on startup
adopted_patterns.limitation: loadSessionState() only logs — does not pre-warm caches

adopted_patterns.real_value: First automated quality measurement: length, structure, sources
adopted_patterns.limitation: Measures completion quality, not semantic quality. 100% rate is proxy (tasks rarely fail outright). Needs human feedback to become real quality signal.

adopted_patterns.real_value: Regex-based credential leak detection before every API call
adopted_patterns.limitation: Warn-only (does not block). Regex patterns may be too narrow. Not tested with injected credentials.

current_data.note: Zero warnings means either no leaks or insufficient detection

adopted_patterns.real_value: None yet — field defined but not populated
adopted_patterns.limitation: No logic to count reinforcements or detect contradictions

rejected_patterns.reason: GPO uses natural language tasks, not slash commands
rejected_patterns.principle_violated: Product simplicity — operator should not need to learn 52 commands

rejected_patterns.reason: GPO's sequential pipeline is simpler and more reliable
14 of 15 GPO engines don't write code
GPO has its own provider chain; MCP is for IDE integration
GPO's event system covers the core need already
GPO doesn't have CI pipeline yet

honest_assessment.mostly_scaffolding: signal-reinforcement — field defined but no logic yet
